channel.title: bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from bothSidesHeadlinesNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Elon Musk's XChat app resembles Facebook Messenger, not Signal
item.description: Musk's encrypted messaging app is a poor extension of his social platform.

item.title: DeepMind's David Silver raises 1.1B for AI that learns without human data
item.description: New British AI lab Ineffable Intelligence secures 1.1 billion in funding.

item.title: M5 MacBook Air hits lowest price ever
item.description: Two months after launch, M5 MacBook Air returns to its lowest price.

item.title: OpenAI resolves Microsoft legal risk over 50B Amazon deal
item.description: OpenAI gains concessions from Microsoft to sell on AWS; Microsoft gets cash.
